assertions.reason: The personas route rendered the expected table/columns, but only the demo study at /studies/demo-study/personas with 3 sample variants was reachable from visible navigation; the browser surface did not expose a live 64-row generated cohort to validate end-to-end.
evidence: Visible route content identified the path as the demo study and showed “Pack: Customer Journey Stress Test Pack · 3 accepted variants visible” while Run budget remained 64.

assertions.reason: Selecting the Cautious checkout shopper filter reduced the grid to 2 rows, and both visible rows belonged to that proto-persona.
evidence: Observed row count after filter: 2, with both rows labeled “Cautious checkout shopper”.

assertions.reason: Setting the Digital confidence minimum filter to 0.5 reduced the grid to the single row whose visible value was +0.82.
evidence: Observed row count after filter: 1, leaving only the Goal-driven power user row with Digital confidence +0.82.

assertions.reason: Score sorting changed the visible row order consistently with the displayed scores: Coherence put the Goal-driven row first, while Distinctness and Edge restored the cautious variant(s) to the top.
evidence: Observed row orders: Coherence desc -> ["Goal-driven power user", "Cautious checkout shopper", "Cautious checkout shopper"]; Distinctness desc -> ["Cautious checkout shopper", "Cautious checkout shopper", "Goal-driven power user"]; Edge desc -> ["Cautious checkout shopper", "Cautious checkout shopper", "Goal-driven power user"].

assertions.reason: Clicking Generate variants immediately disabled the button, changed its label to “Generating variants...”, showed a loading status line, and then restored the button with a completion message.
evidence: During loading the button label became “Generating variants...” and snapshot showed it disabled; afterward the page showed “Demo refresh complete. 3 accepted variants remain ready for review.”

frictions: After signup the preserved redirect reopened a stale protected persona-pack route; reaching the intended validation surface required one explicit click on the Studies sidebar link.
blockers: Only the demo-study persona-review route was reachable from visible navigation; no live study creation surface exists yet, so a generated 64-variant cohort could not be validated end-to-end.
